## Checks

- [ ] `python3 -m pip install -r api/requirements.txt` completed if API code changed
- [ ] `make test-python` passed
- [ ] `forge test --root contracts` passed
- [ ] `pnpm build` passed in `web/`
- [ ] docs updated if user-facing behavior changed
